description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-divider` (T1-07) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, orientation (horizontal/vertical) typed, decorative flag typed
2. Accessibility — `role="separator"` with correct aria-orientation, decorative uses `role="presentation"`, axe-core pass
3. Tests — horizontal/vertical, decorative/semantic, label in divider, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — orientation and decorative variants
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts (line, label), spacing tokens
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be tiny)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-divider — T1-07 antagonistic quality review
